subcodes.first_line: O thou who art weary, pierced by the arrow of persecution in the path of God! The Ancient Beauty hath been made captive in the clutches of tyranny of every base oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خسته تیر جفا در سبیل الهی جمال قدیم در پنجه ستم هر لایم و زنیم گرفتار گشت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
